title: polystichum effusum
intro: Polystichum effusum, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to East Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from pain. Herbal preparations of Polystichum effusum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
